text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh. My. GOSH!!!1! My first G1 race, the NHK Mile Cup, is actually here! I'm up against the lineup of my dreams! Maxed out sublime! I so don't belong here!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
What in the world is it that makes Umamusume
sparkle so? Today is the day I find out! d-(>O<)-b
